115 AC1T AC1T_ATTEND_CHURCH (AC1T) Usually Attends Church/Temple/Synagogue CHAR 1 Customary routine: involvement patterns - usually attends church, temple, etc.. 0 = No, 1 = Yes, "-" = Unknown, -2 = Space
